title: 密着！情熱ダービー特集ッ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around campus, I see a
crowd forming...

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Everything's set for our "Hot Derby Special"
full-day coverage. We're ready to start shooting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! Yeah, this interview's got me really tense.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, no more weird faces! Control yourself! She
sells seashells, she sells seashells...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're already filming?!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Relax! Just show us your fiery passion for the
Derby in a way only you can!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Get a load of this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I see Winning Ticket nervously being
interviewed everywhere I go...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
HAH! My thigh muscles are rock-hard from doing
these leg presses!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! So this is how you build your leg
strength! And your dreams for the Derby are what
motivated all this, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gah! Er, y-yeah! It's all for the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! Hamburger steak and omelet rice! Time
to chow down!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Could these meal choices be related to the
Derby as well?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Gwah! U-uh huh! They're totally... related!
Probably!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: This is impossible! I'm totally on edge! I can't run like thiiiiis!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
All right then, how about we call it a day on the
running and switch to the sit-down interview?

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm pretty surprised. Even a seasoned
veteran like you gets nervous, huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know... I mean, it'd be no problem if
this was just a normal interview.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's like whenever I talk about the Derby, I get
super excited... and maybe a little defensive?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just watching the Derby makes my heart pound in a totally different way from other races!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: A different way, you say?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've always loved the Derby, ever since I
was little. It's a fierce competition where
everyone puts their whole hearts into it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it makes my heart go THUMP,
THUMP, THUMP!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why everything's suddenly like WOW! And
my body just goes ZAZOOM!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text:
So... In other words, the Derby amazes you
enough to send your emotions racing. Is that
correct?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's so awesome! Just talking about it is
making me sweat... and... and...

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: Um... Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaagh! I need to run! Be right back!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: R-run? You mean right now?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here I goooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOOOOOO! DERRRBYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: News Crew
text_block_list.text: T-Ticket! What about the interview?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I hear that the interview concluded
successfully after Winning Ticket finished her run.
